name: Zone-2 Run
coach_notes: RPE: 2-2.5. Walk-run method to stay Zone 2 — stopped to walk whenever HR approached 148, resumed at 120. Didn't check time once. Back and elbow: no issues. Strong process discipline.

name: Evening Badminton
coach_notes: RPE: 4 (body sore from morning strength session, otherwise 3). Chill session — opponents were beginners, well below usual semi-pro level. Last 10-13 min: 1v2, slightly more intense but still low load. Elbow: mild flare on mis-hit shots toward end of session, resolved. Left lower back: flared during overhead shots, still sore post-session. Overhead shot pattern causing left lower back stress — flag for monitoring.

name: Morning Weight Training
coach_notes: RPE: 7. First time doing weighted upper body exercises — high RPE due to form learning, not exhaustion. Elbow fine, no issues. Swapped from run day (5hrs sleep due to overnight emergency). Session: push-ups, DB chest press 8kg/side, DB bent-over row 8kg/side, band face pulls, lateral raises 4kg/side, dead bugs, plank.

name: Night Weight Training
coach_notes: RPE: 5. Exercises: dumbbell squats 8kg/side, Romanian deadlifts 8kg/side, reverse lunges 8kg/side — 10x2 sets each (first strength session, conservative volume). No joint pain. Lower back burning sensation by end — likely RDL form or erector fatigue. Monitor tomorrow.

name: Morning Run
coach_notes: RPE: 6-7. General soreness from deconditioning — no specific area. HR ran Zone 3-4 (avg 152, peak 173) vs Zone 2 target. Distance 5km vs planned 4km. First run of Birthday Run Season base phase.

name: Morning Weight Training
description:
Skips x100
Weighted skips x400 (1kg weights each side)
Bicep Curls x60
Lateral Raises x60
Forward Raises x60
Done with a resistance band
